sentences.target: Ich kaufe heute Lebensmittel im Supermarkt.

translations.de: Ich kaufe heute Lebensmittel im Supermarkt.
translations.en: I'm buying groceries today at the supermarket.
translations.es: Hoy hago la compra en el supermercado.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, je fais les courses au supermarché.
translations.it: Oggi faccio la spesa al supermercato.
translations.ru: Сегодня я покупаю продукты в супермаркете.
translations.pt: Hoje eu faço compras no supermercado.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi mua thực phẩm ở siêu thị.
translations.ar: اليوم أشتري مواد غذائية من السوبرماركت.
translations.nl: Ik doe vandaag boodschappen in de supermarkt.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я купую продукти в супермаркеті.
translations.hi: आज मैं सुपरमार्केट से किराने का सामान खरीद रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Σήμερα κάνω ψώνια στο σούπερ μάρκετ.
translations.nb: I dag handler jeg mat i supermarkedet.
translations.id: Hari ini saya belanja di supermarket.
translations.sv: Idag handlar jag mat i mataffären.
translations.ro: Astăzi cumpăr alimente de la supermarket.
translations.da: I dag køber jeg dagligvarer i supermarkedet.
translations.ja: 今日はスーパーで食料品を買います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative 1st person singular; main predicate selecting a direct object.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb/clause.
Plural noun (pluralia tantum); accusative plural direct object of 'kaufe'.
Contracted preposition ('in' + definite article 'dem'); introduces a locative PP and governs dative.
Common noun; dative singular complement of the preposition 'im', denoting location.

sentences.target: Die Lebensmittel sind frisch und günstig.

translations.de: Die Lebensmittel sind frisch und günstig.
translations.en: The groceries are fresh and cheap.
translations.es: Los productos están frescos y baratos.
translations.fr: Les produits sont frais et pas chers.
translations.it: I prodotti sono freschi ed economici.
translations.zh-Hans: 这些食品很新鲜又便宜。
translations.pt: Os produtos estão frescos e baratos.
translations.nl: De producten zijn vers en goedkoop.
translations.el: Τα προϊόντα είναι φρέσκα και φθηνά.
translations.ja: 食料品は新鮮で安いです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative plural determiner of 'Lebensmittel'.
Plural noun (pluralia tantum); subject of the clause.
Finite copular auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person plural; links the subject to predicate adjectives.
Adjective used predicatively; first item in a coordination.
Coordinating conjunction linking predicate adjectives.
Adjective used predicatively; second item in the coordination.

sentences.target: Wir brauchen Lebensmittel für das Abendessen.

translations.de: Wir brauchen Lebensmittel für das Abendessen.
translations.fr: Il nous faut des produits pour le dîner.
translations.it: Abbiamo bisogno di generi alimentari per la cena.
translations.yue: 我哋需要晚餐用嘅食材。
translations.pt: Precisamos de alimentos para o jantar.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi cần thực phẩm cho bữa tối.
translations.ar: نحن بحاجة إلى مواد غذائية للعشاء.
translations.nl: We hebben boodschappen nodig voor het avondeten.
translations.hi: हमें रात के खाने के लिए किराने का सामान चाहिए.
translations.id: Kami perlu bahan makanan untuk makan malam.
translations.ro: Avem nevoie de alimente pentru cină.
translations.da: Vi har brug for dagligvarer til aftensmad.
translations.ja: 夕食の食材が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative 1st person plural; transitive, selecting a direct object.
Plural noun (pluralia tantum); accusative plural direct object of 'brauchen'.
Preposition introducing a purpose PP; governs accusative.
Definite article; accusative singular neuter determiner of 'Abendessen'.
Common noun; accusative singular neuter, object of the preposition 'für' indicating purpose.

sentences.target: Ich bezahle die Lebensmittel an der Kasse.
sentences.reading: /ɪç bəˈtsaːlə diː ˈleːbənsˌmɪtl̩ an deːɐ̯ ˈkasə/

translations.de: Ich bezahle die Lebensmittel an der Kasse.
translations.ipa: /ɪç bəˈtsaːlə diː ˈleːbənsˌmɪtl̩ an deːɐ̯ ˈkasə/
translations.en: I'm paying for the groceries at the checkout.
translations.es: Pago la compra en la caja.
translations.fr: Je paie les courses à la caisse.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在收银台为这些食品结账。
translations.yue: 我喺收銀台畀錢買啲餸。
translations.ru: Я плачу за продукты на кассе.
translations.pt: Eu pago as compras no caixa.
translations.vi: Tôi trả tiền thực phẩm ở quầy tính tiền.
translations.ar: أدفع ثمن المواد الغذائية عند صندوق الدفع.
translations.nl: Ik betaal de boodschappen bij de kassa.
translations.uk: Я плачу за продукти на касі.
translations.hi: मैं कैश काउंटर पर किराने का भुगतान कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg betaler for varene i kassen.
translations.sv: Jag betalar för varorna i kassan.
translations.da: Jeg betaler for varerne ved kassen.
translations.ja: レジで食料品の代金を払います。

Preposition introducing a locative PP; governs dative.
Definite article; dative singular feminine determiner of 'Kasse'.
Common noun; dative singular feminine, object of the preposition 'an' denoting location.

jp: Ich kaufe heute Lebensmittel im Supermarkt.
Die Lebensmittel sind frisch und günstig.
Wir brauchen Lebensmittel für das Abendessen.
Ich bezahle die Lebensmittel an der Kasse.
fu: /ɪç bəˈtsaːlə diː ˈleːbənsˌmɪtl̩ an deːɐ̯ ˈkasə/

en: I'm buying groceries today at the supermarket.
The groceries are fresh and cheap.
I'm paying for the groceries at the checkout.
